jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Freshworks
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
